title: Employee Directory and Org Chart System

prd.oneLiner: Connect employee profiles, org charts, reporting lines, expertise, contact details, and change history.
prd.goal: Maintain 95% or more required-profile completeness for active employees.
prd.whyNow: Employee, department, role, and expertise data are spread across systems, making collaborators and accountable owners hard to find.
prd.problem: Employee, department, role, and expertise data are spread across systems, making collaborators and accountable owners hard to find.
prd.solution: Connect employee profiles, org charts, reporting lines, expertise, contact details, and change history.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Employee finding colleagues and organization information
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Employee, department, role, and expertise data are spread across systems, making collaborators and accountable owners hard to find.

targets.name: HR and organization-data coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Employee, department, role, and expertise data are spread across systems, making collaborators and accountable owners hard to find.

scenarios.text: Employee finding colleagues and organization information completes employee profile, organization, and role registration and checks progress.
HR and organization-data coordinator reviews organization freshness, profile completeness, and change-history reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Maintain 95% or more required-profile completeness for active employees.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Employee profile, organization, and role registration
Employee, department, reporting-line, and expertise lookup
Organization change, profile update, and ownership verification handling
Organization freshness, profile completeness, and change-history reporting
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
